title: Create & Conquer
description: Modern Survival Engineering with expansive world generation
body:
# 🌍 Create & Conquer – Modern Survival Engineering & Sorcery (NeoForge 1.21.1) A breathtaking sandbox where industrial precision meets arcane power. Build massive kinetic factories, master the arts of magic, and shape a world brought to life by cutting-edge generation and stunning visuals. ## ⚙️ Features at a Glance ### 🏗️ Advanced Automation: Industrialize your world with Create, Mekanism, and Immersive Engineering, all tied together with Refined Storage for digital logistics. ### 🔮 Magic & RPG Classes: Define your path as a Wizard, Paladin, Priest, or Rogue using the RPG Series. Master spells, discover ancient Relics, and craft powerful jewelry. ### 🗺️ Epic World Generation: Experience a vast landscape powered by Tectonic and Terralith, featuring overhauled structures like YUNG’s Better Dungeons, Strongholds, and Towns and Towers. ### 🎨 Immersive Visuals: Photorealistic lighting via Iris and Distant Horizons (LODs) for infinite view distances without sacrificing performance. ### ⚔️ Dynamic Combat: Engage in fluid battles with Better Combat, featuring unique weapon animations, new ranged options, and overhauled mobs like Creeper and Enderman Overhaul. ### 🧱 Boundless Creativity: Decorate with an enormous selection from Chipped, FramedBlocks, Handcrafted, and the entire Macaw’s collection. 📂 Deep Dive into Features
🛠️ Engineering & Automation Build complex machinery with Create and its many expansions (Enchantment Industry, Crafts & Additions). Utilize Mekanism for high-tier resource processing and Immersive Engineering for an authentic industrial aesthetic.
🪄 Magic & RPG Elements Harness the power of Wizards, Paladins & Priests, or Archers. Collect unique Artifacts and use the Enchanting Infuser or Easy Magic to create the ultimate gear.
🏔️ Exploration & Structures Explore a redefined world with Tectonic’s massive mountain ranges and Terralith’s diverse biomes. Delve into Adventure Dungeons, Hopo Better Mineshafts, and Abandoned Watchtowers.
🍕 Farming & Lifestyle Expand your culinary skills with Farmer’s Delight, Expanded Delight, and Fruits Delight. Automate your agriculture with Smarter Farmers and Tree Harvester for a cozy lifestyle.
🚀 Performance & Optimization Stay smooth with Sodium, FerriteCore, and ModernFix. Enjoy 3D crops, 3D skin layers, and high-fidelity soundscapes with Sound Physics Remastered and AmbientSounds.
🚨 Technical Setup Minecraft Version: 1.21.1 (NeoForge 21.1.x) RAM Allocation: 16 GB Minimum (32-64 GB recommended) Shaders: Complementary Reimagined, Bliss, or Photon (included and pre-configured) Key Utility: Use the Explorer’s Compass and Nature’s Compass to find the specific biomes and structures you need for your progression.
